dialogs.script:
say: You already have a starter, {player}!
say: Take good care of it!

showimage: pokemon/squirtle
say: Squirtle!
say: The Tiny Turtle Pokemon. A Water type.
say: It shelters itself in its shell when in danger!
choice: Do you want to choose Squirtle?
hideimage
givepokemon: squirtle 5
setflag: pokemon_chosen
setflag: starter_is_squirtle
clearflag: starter_is_bulbasaur
clearflag: starter_is_charmander
say: Squirtle was added to your party!
say: Take good care of it, {player}!
hidenpc
